664: export async function runWorkspaceDeploymentInlineWithRetries(
665:   env: Env,
666:   workspaceId: string,
667:   deploymentId: string,

670:   async function recoverInlineRunningDeployment(): Promise<boolean> {
671:     const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
672:     if (!latest || latest.status !== 'running') {
673:       return false;
674:     }
675: 
676:     if (latest.cancelRequestedAt) {
677:       await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
678:       return true;
679:     }
680: 
681:     if (latest.attemptCount > latest.maxRetries) {
682:       return false;
683:     }
684: 
685:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'queued', {
686:       workspaceId,
687:       startedAt: null,
688:       finishedAt: null,
689:       errorCode: 'retry_scheduled',
690:       errorMessage: 'Recovered inline deployment retry after transient failure',
691:     });
692:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
693:       workspaceId,
694:       deploymentId,
695:       eventType: 'deployment_retry_scheduled',

697:     });
698:     return true;
699:   }

701:   for (let cycle = 0; cycle < maxCycles; cycle += 1) {
702:     let retryableErrorRaised = false;
703:     try {
704:       await processWorkspaceDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
705:     } catch (error) {
706:       if (error instanceof QueueRetryError && /already running; defer redelivery/i.test(error.message)) {
707:         try {
708:           const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
709:           if (latest?.status === 'running' && latest.cancelRequestedAt) {
710:             await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
711:             continue;
712:           }
713:         } catch {
714:           // Best-effort inline recovery only.
715:         }
716:         return;
717:       }

719:       if (shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(error)) {
720:         retryableErrorRaised = true;

722:           const recovered = await recoverInlineRunningDeployment();
723:           if (recovered) {

725:           }
726:         } catch {
727:           // Best-effort inline recovery only.
728:         }
729:       }
730:     }
731: 
732:     const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
733:     if (!latest) {
734:       return;
735:     }
736:     if (latest.status !== 'queued') {

739:     if (retryableErrorRaised) {

33:   if (normalized === 'true' || normalized === '1' || normalized === 'yes' || normalized === 'on') {
34:     return true;
35:   }
36: 
37:   if (normalized === 'false' || normalized === '0' || normalized === 'no' || normalized === 'off') {
38:     return false;
39:   }
40: 
41:   return fallback;
42: }
43: 
44: function parseInteger(
45:   value: string | undefined,
46:   fallback: number,
47:   options?: { min?: number; max?: number }
48: ): number {
49:   if (value === undefined) {
50:     return fallback;
51:   }
52: 
53:   const parsed = Number.parseInt(value.trim(), 10);
54:   if (Number.isNaN(parsed)) {
55:     return fallback;
56:   }
57: 
58:   if (options?.min !== undefined && parsed < options.min) {
59:     return options.min;
60:   }
61: 
62:   if (options?.max !== undefined && parsed > options.max) {
63:     return options.max;
64:   }
65: 
66:   return parsed;
67: }
68: 
69: function normalizeRuntimeFlags(flags: RuntimeFlags): RuntimeFlags {
70:   return {
71:     ...flags,
72:     totalTimeoutMs: Math.max(flags.totalTimeoutMs, flags.attemptTimeoutMs),
73:   };
74: }
75: 
76: export function getRuntimeFlagsFromEnv(env: Env): RuntimeFlags {
77:   const resolved: RuntimeFlags = {
78:     v2Enabled: parseBoolean(env.V2_ENABLED, DEFAULT_RUNTIME_FLAGS.v2Enabled),
79:     v2CodeBrowserEnabled: parseBoolean(
80:       env.V2_CODE_BROWSER_ENABLED,
81:       DEFAULT_RUNTIME_FLAGS.v2CodeBrowserEnabled
82:     ),
83:     maxAttempts: parseInteger(env.MAX_ATTEMPTS, DEFAULT_RUNTIME_FLAGS.maxAttempts, { min: 1, max: 10 }),
84:     attemptTimeoutMs: parseInteger(
85:       env.ATTEMPT_TIMEOUT_MS,
86:       DEFAULT_RUNTIME_FLAGS.attemptTimeoutMs,
87:       { min: 60000 }
88:     ),
89:     totalTimeoutMs: parseInteger(env.TOTAL_TIMEOUT_MS, DEFAULT_RUNTIME_FLAGS.totalTimeoutMs, {
90:       min: 60000,
91:     }),
92:     idempotencyTtlHours: parseInteger(
93:       env.IDEMPOTENCY_TTL_HOURS,
94:       DEFAULT_RUNTIME_FLAGS.idempotencyTtlHours,
95:       { min: 1, max: 168 }
96:     ),
97:     maxRepairCycles: parseInteger(
98:       env.MAX_REPAIR_CYCLES,
99:       DEFAULT_RUNTIME_FLAGS.maxRepairCycles,
100:       { min: 0, max: 10 }
101:     ),
102:     lintBlocking: parseBoolean(env.LINT_BLOCKING, DEFAULT_RUNTIME_FLAGS.lintBlocking),
103:     testBlocking: parseBoolean(env.TEST_BLOCKING, DEFAULT_RUNTIME_FLAGS.testBlocking),
104:     safeInstallIgnoreScripts: parseBoolean(
105:       env.SAFE_INSTALL_IGNORE_SCRIPTS,
106:       DEFAULT_RUNTIME_FLAGS.safeInstallIgnoreScripts
107:     ),
108:     autoInstallScriptsFallback: parseBoolean(
109:       env.AUTO_INSTALL_SCRIPTS_FALLBACK,
110:       DEFAULT_RUNTIME_FLAGS.autoInstallScriptsFallback
111:     ),
112:     rawRetentionDays: parseInteger(
113:       env.RAW_RETENTION_DAYS,
114:       DEFAULT_RUNTIME_FLAGS.rawRetentionDays,
115:       { min: 1 }
116:     ),
117:     summaryRetentionDays: parseInteger(
118:       env.SUMMARY_RETENTION_DAYS,
119:       DEFAULT_RUNTIME_FLAGS.summaryRetentionDays,
120:       { min: 1 }
121:     ),
122:     workspaceAgentRuntimeEnabled: parseBoolean(
123:       env.WORKSPACE_AGENT_RUNTIME_ENABLED,
124:       DEFAULT_RUNTIME_FLAGS.workspaceAgentRuntimeEnabled
125:     ),
126:     workspaceDeployEnabled: parseBoolean(env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_ENABLED, DEFAULT_RUNTIME_FLAGS.workspaceDeployEnabled),
127:   };
128: 
129:   return normalizeRuntimeFlags(resolved);
130: }
131: 
132: export function mergeRuntimeFlagOverrides(
133:   base: RuntimeFlags,
134:   rows: RuntimeFlagRow[]
135: ): RuntimeFlags {
136:   const merged: RuntimeFlags = { ...base };
137: 
138:   for (const row of rows) {
139:     switch (row.key) {
140:       case 'v2_enabled':
141:         merged.v2Enabled = parseBoolean(row.value, merged.v2Enabled);
142:         break;
143:       case 'v2_code_browser_enabled':
144:         merged.v2CodeBrowserEnabled = parseBoolean(row.value, merged.v2CodeBrowserEnabled);
145:         break;
146:       case 'max_attempts':
147:         merged.maxAttempts = parseInteger(row.value, merged.maxAttempts, { min: 1, max: 10 });
148:         break;
149:       case 'attempt_timeout_ms':
150:         merged.attemptTimeoutMs = parseInteger(row.value, merged.attemptTimeoutMs, { min: 60000 });
151:         break;
152:       case 'total_timeout_ms':
153:         merged.totalTimeoutMs = parseInteger(row.value, merged.totalTimeoutMs, { min: 60000 });
154:         break;
155:       case 'idempotency_ttl_hours':
156:         merged.idempotencyTtlHours = parseInteger(row.value, merged.idempotencyTtlHours, {
157:           min: 1,
158:           max: 168,
159:         });
160:         break;
161:       case 'max_repair_cycles':
162:         merged.maxRepairCycles = parseInteger(row.value, merged.maxRepairCycles, {
163:           min: 0,
164:           max: 10,
165:         });
166:         break;
167:       case 'lint_blocking':
168:         merged.lintBlocking = parseBoolean(row.value, merged.lintBlocking);
169:         break;
170:       case 'test_blocking':
171:         merged.testBlocking = parseBoolean(row.value, merged.testBlocking);
172:         break;
173:       case 'safe_install_ignore_scripts':
174:         merged.safeInstallIgnoreScripts = parseBoolean(row.value, merged.safeInstallIgnoreScripts);
175:         break;
176:       case 'auto_install_scripts_fallback':
177:         merged.autoInstallScriptsFallback = parseBoolean(
178:           row.value,
179:           merged.autoInstallScriptsFallback
180:         );
181:         break;
182:       case 'raw_retention_days':
183:         merged.rawRetentionDays = parseInteger(row.value, merged.rawRetentionDays, { min: 1 });
184:         break;
185:       case 'summary_retention_days':
186:         merged.summaryRetentionDays = parseInteger(row.value, merged.summaryRetentionDays, { min: 1 });
187:         break;
188:       case 'workspace_agent_runtime_enabled':
189:         merged.workspaceAgentRuntimeEnabled = parseBoolean(row.value, merged.workspaceAgentRuntimeEnabled);
190:         break;
191:       case 'workspace_deploy_enabled':
192:         merged.workspaceDeployEnabled = parseBoolean(row.value, merged.workspaceDeployEnabled);
193:         break;
194:       default:
195:         break;
196:     }
197:   }
198: 
199:   return normalizeRuntimeFlags(merged);
200: }
201: 
202: export async function loadRuntimeFlags(env: Env): Promise<RuntimeFlags> {
203:   const fromEnv = getRuntimeFlagsFromEnv(env);
204: 
205:   try {
206:     const result = await env.DB
207:       .prepare('SELECT key, value FROM runtime_flags')
208:       .all<RuntimeFlagRow>();
209: 
210:     return mergeRuntimeFlagOverrides(fromEnv, result.results);
211:   } catch (error) {
212:     const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
213:     console.warn(`[flags] Failed to load runtime overrides, using env defaults: ${message}`);
214:     return fromEnv;
215:   }
216: }
